problem id: 271f72f5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01010100 -> 00000001
  11110001 -> 10000011
  01001011 -> 10000001
  01011100 -> 00000001
  10110111 -> 10000010
  00101001 -> 10000000
  01011010 -> 00000001
  10110100 -> 00000010

query: 00101100
predicted answer: 00000000
